column1: この仕事はあなたに任せます。
column2: このしごとはあなたにまかせます。
column3: I'll leave this work to you.
column4: を〜に任せる (leave ~ to, entrust ~ to, let ~ take over)
column5: Object + を + Person/Force + に + 任せる
column6: を〜に任せる: full delegation of task to named person
column7: を〜に任せる: full delegation of task to named person
column8: を〜に任せる = delegate/entrust; に頼む = ask/request; に委ねる = entrust (more formal); 自由にさせる = let do freely
